plan_adherence_notes: All 14 plan steps completed successfully. Types match plan spec exactly (OutcomePnl, MarketPnlSummary, MarketPnlResponse, AccountPnlMarket, AccountPnlResponse in camelCase). API client functions use correct endpoints. Hooks have 30s refetchInterval and accountId guards. All 5 analytics components created in features/analytics/ with correct props, state handling, and styling. MarketAnalytics placed between ProbabilityBar and PositionCard; PnLSummary after PositionCard; AccountPnL in Portfolio. Three test files follow existing Vitest+RTL pattern. Minor deviation: PriceHistoryChart accepts interval/onIntervalChange props from parent (MarketAnalytics manages interval state and re-fetches), which is actually better separation of concerns than the plan implied. Build passes, 76/76 tests pass.
missed_questions: No question about accessibility (keyboard navigation, ARIA attributes) for collapsible sections and chart components
No question about responsive/mobile behavior of recharts charts and P&L tables
No question about bundle size impact of adding recharts as a dependency (build shows 707KB chunk warning)
reason: Implementation faithfully follows the 14-step plan. All P&L types match the documented backend response shapes (camelCase, {pnl:{...}, meta:{...}} wrapper, outcomes as Record<string, OutcomePnl>). Components handle three states correctly (no account → null, 404 → placeholder, 200 → data). Charts use CSS variable hex values for theming consistency. Tests cover rendering, loading, error, and empty states. TypeScript builds clean, all 76 tests pass across 13 files. The only gap is the build size warning (707KB chunk), but that's a pre-existing concern not specific to this task.
